title: astragalus gueldenstaedtiae
intro: Astragalus gueldenstaedtiae, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family that is native to the steppes of Central Asia. Traditionally, the root of Astragalus gueldenstaedtiae is used in medicine due to its adaptogenic properties, which allow it to help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus gueldenstaedtiae include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus gueldenstaedtiae is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also available as a capsule or supplement in modern herbal medicine.
